# nomad_namespace (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nomad_namespace" "namespaces" {
  name = "default"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)

### Read-Only

- `capabilities` (Set of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--capabilities))
- `consul_config` (List of Object) Consul configuration for the namespace. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--consul_config))
- `description` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `meta` (Map of String)
- `node_pool_config` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--node_pool_config))
- `quota` (String)
- `vault_config` (List of Object) Vault configuration for the namespace. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--vault_config))

<a id="nestedatt--capabilities"></a>
### Nested Schema for `capabilities`

Read-Only:

- `disabled_network_modes` (List of String)
- `disabled_task_drivers` (List of String)
- `enabled_network_modes` (List of String)
- `enabled_task_drivers` (List of String)


<a id="nestedatt--consul_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `consul_config`

Read-Only:

- `allowed` (Set of String)
- `default` (String)
- `denied` (Set of String)


<a id="nestedatt--node_pool_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `node_pool_config`

Read-Only:

- `allowed` (Set of String)
- `default` (String)
- `denied` (Set of String)

### Nested Schema for `vault_config`

Read-Only:

- `default` (String)
